prospects.name: Investopedia (Mortgage Section)
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Major finance education site. Mortgage section gets millions of views.
prospects.pitch: Free embeddable mortgage affordability widget for their mortgage education hub

prospects.name: Zillow (Resource/Blog)
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Largest real estate platform. Resource section could feature tools.
prospects.pitch: Complementary affordability widget — helps buyers determine budget before browsing Zillow
prospects.decision: NEEDS_REVISION — large corp, need stronger angle

prospects.name: BiggerPockets
prospects.relevance: HIGH — Real estate investor community. 2M+ members. Investor-focused mortgage content.
prospects.pitch: Free affordability widget for their real estate investment calculators section

prospects.name: MyMoney.gov (Federal Financial Literacy)
prospects.relevance: HIGH — US government financial literacy portal. .gov domain = huge authority boost if linked.
prospects.pitch: Free financial calculators for their tools and resources section

prospects.name: ChooseFI
prospects.relevance: HIGH — FIRE community with engaged audience. Homebuying is a major FIRE topic.
prospects.pitch: Free mortgage affordability widget for their FI resources section
